title: [DOCS] Missing `network` type in events document
body:
https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/5a0b74b13e6e8dfe9cc1d416eed743f219a83237/docs/source/markdown/podman-events.1.md?plain=1#L22

Although events for network were added here https://github.com/containers/podman/issues/24032, it is not updated in our document.

We need to update it.
